visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen layout. On the left, an inset video shows a person biting into a green mango; on the right, the main host, a young woman in a green t-shirt and white headphones, reacts with wide eyes while holding a yellow bag of snacks. (2) The host addresses the camera, gesturing animatedly. She presents a plastic container of green mangoes and then another containing three yellow mangoes, appearing confused and inquisitive. The setting is a brightly lit indoor room with a plain white wall. (3) She takes out a tray of sliced green mango strips and tastes one plain, nodding in approval. (4) The host begins a preparation sequence, mixing various condiments in a glass measuring cup using a patterned spoon. She adds dark liquid, powders, and viscous syrups. (5) On a large white plate, she arranges the mango slices around two whole yellow mangoes and pours the dark, seed-laden sauce over them. (6) She eats the seasoned mango, showing a high-energy, positive reaction. She then pours more clear liquid from a bottle onto the plate. (7) She attempts to bite into a whole, sauce-covered yellow mango, but it slips, leading to a humorous facial expression. (8) The video transitions to a step-by-step demonstration of a mango-eating 'hack': she cuts the top, uses her teeth to extract the pit, and finally scoops the internal flesh with a spoon. (9) The final segment shows her enjoying the mango with the sauce, smiling and encouraging viewers to try it.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來源出處 tok-tak_kat. [Slogan]: 海外網紅爆紅吃法🔥連皮一起吃的青芒果🥭. [Subtitle]: 芒果皮全部吃起來? 😳. (2) [Subtitle]: 青芒果+辣醬油?. [Variety]: 實驗歐膩🇰🇷. (3) [Subtitle]: 我明明有在APP點了 綠色的青芒果. (4) [Subtitle]: 但是我收到的為什麼是... 黃色的?. [Subtitle]: 這個也可以嗎😳. (5) [Subtitle]: 我另外在水果店有叫外送. [Subtitle]: 但是呢 他們幫我切好😂. (6) [Subtitle]: (先試吃原味). [Subtitle]: 已經很好吃!!!. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為我好像去年在馬來西亞 有吃過很類似的東西! 也是用青芒果做的. [Subtitle]: 先做個醬料!. (8) [Slogan]: +醬油. [Slogan]: +胡椒粉. [Slogan]: +果寡糖(或白糖). [Slogan]: +白醋. [Slogan]: +魚露. [Slogan]: +芝麻. (9) [Subtitle]: 重點是要加「這個」. [Subtitle]: 韓國的牛肉調味粉. (10) [Variety]: 完成. (11) [Subtitle]: (有點像馬鈴薯..). (12) [Subtitle]: 超爆好吃😭. [Subtitle]: 酸酸甜甜的芒果配上鹹鹹的醬汁. (13) [Subtitle]: (想多加白醋). (14) [Subtitle]: 真的好好吃喔 根本像在吃泰國菜一樣! 🇹🇭😋. [Subtitle]: 太好吃了!!!. (15) [Subtitle]: 好像也可以直接加辣椒. [Subtitle]: (試吃看看整顆). (16) [Subtitle]: 好像不行欸. [Subtitle]: 這就是一般的芒果欸. (17) [Subtitle]: 給大家看一個很神奇的方法. [Subtitle]: 1. 先把芒果上面切開, 然後整顆輕輕壓一下. (18) [Subtitle]: 2. 用牙齒把芒果核咬出來. (19) [Subtitle]: 3. 芒果核那一部分先啃一啃. (20) [Subtitle]: 4. 剩下的果肉就用湯匙挖來吃. (21) [Subtitle]: 我從網紅們學到這個技巧哈哈哈. (22) [Subtitle]: 總之這次挑戰大成功😍. [Subtitle]: 大家也吃過這種的嗎?. [Subtitle]: 記得在家裡試吃看看喔!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground and 1 female in the embedded split-screen clip.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a green t-shirt and white over-ear headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a white wall and a hint of grey furniture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo pop remix (resembling 'Barbie Girl') and the host's energetic female voice. A sharp 'crunch' sound effect emphasizes the first bite of the mango shown in the split-screen. (2) Frequent 'ding' and 'pop' SFX are used to accentuate the appearance of on-screen text and graphics as the host describes her mango delivery. (3) Sloshing and rhythmic stirring sounds are heard as she prepares the sauce, layered over the continuous pop music. (4) Prominent, amplified chewing sounds (mukbang style) occur as she tastes the sauced mango, followed by high-pitched vocal expressions of enjoyment. (5) A comical 'whoosh' sound effect plays when a whole mango slips from her hand/bite. (6) The video concludes with the host speaking rapidly over the music, with occasional percussive sounds of a spoon hitting the mango skin during the hack demonstration.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Conflict (order error) -> Resolution (recipe) -> Climax (tasting/hack) -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To participate in a viral food trend involving green mangoes and a specific savory sauce, while also providing a life hack for eating mangoes. The intent is entertainment and trend-based food exploration.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging, fast-paced short-form video that utilizes mukbang-style audio, reaction tropes, and educational 'life hacks' to capture viewer interest.
